goals: Verify first payment with text-based roleplay and anxiety reduction loop.
Launch on Vercel with real Supabase DB and Stripe integration.

api_contracts.name: POST /api/chat
api_contracts.description: Handles GPT-4o NPC responses based on scenario and user input.

api_contracts.name: POST /api/payment
api_contracts.description: Stripe webhook handler for subscription status updates.

tasks.title: Project Initialization
tasks.description: Setup Next.js 15, Tailwind v4, Shadcn UI, pnpm.

tasks.title: Database & Authentication
tasks.description: Setup Supabase schemas (User, Scenario, ScenarioSession, UserProgress, etc.) and Social Login (Kakao, Google).

tasks.title: Scenario Navigation & Free Tier
tasks.description: Create Scenario list page. Implement locking for premium scenarios and unlocking for 5 free scenarios.

tasks.title: Roleplay Chat Interface & GPT-4o Integration
tasks.description: Build chat UI and integrate Server Action for GPT-4o NPC responses with max_tokens limit.

tasks.title: Anxiety Measurement & Weekly Graph
tasks.description: Pre/Post session 1-10 slider and user dashboard with weekly progress chart.

tasks.title: Gamification (Levels & Badges)
tasks.description: Implement level 1-3 tracking and 5 badge unlocks upon completing scenarios.

tasks.title: Subscription System
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe ₩12,900/month checkout and update User Subscription status.

reviews.completeness: Passed. All Phase 1 requirements from 03_PHASES.md are mapped.
reviews.simplicity: Passed. No audio, no complex multiplayer, sticking to MVP strictly.
